title: Supreme Court Docket US-SCOTUS-0312
summary: 1 These are companion cases to Shelley v. 2 In 1906, twenty of thirty-one lots in the 100 block of Bryant Street, Northwest, in the City of Washington, were sold subject to the following covenant: '* * * that said lot shall never be rented, leased, sold, transferred or conveyed unto any Negro or ...
